tEn: Perceptual Losses for Real-Time Style Transfer and Super-Resolution
tZh: 用于实时风格迁移和超分辨率的感知损失
sEn: Perceptual loss functions enable feed-forward networks to achieve real-time style transfer and improved super-resolution quality.
sZh: 感知损失函数使前馈网络能够实现实时风格迁移并提升超分辨率质量。
absEn: We consider image transformation problems, where an input image is transformed into an output image. Recent methods for such problems typically train feed-forward convolutional neural networks using a \emph{per-pixel} loss between the output and ground-truth images. Parallel work has shown that high-quality images can be generated by defining and optimizing \emph{perceptual} loss functions based on high-level features extracted from pretrained networks. We combine the benefits of both approaches, and propose the use of perceptual loss functions for training feed-forward networks for image transformation tasks. We show results on image style transfer, where a feed-forward network is trained to solve the optimization problem proposed by Gatys et al in real-time. Compared to the optimization-based method, our network gives similar qualitative results but is three orders of magnitude faster. We also experiment with single-image super-resolution, where replacing a per-pixel loss with a perceptual loss gives visually pleasing results.
absZh: 我们考虑图像变换问题，即输入图像被转换为输出图像。近期此类方法通常使用输出与真实图像之间的逐像素损失来训练前馈卷积神经网络。并行工作表明，通过定义和优化基于预训练网络高层特征提取的感知损失函数，可以生成高质量图像。我们结合了两种方法的优点，提出在图像变换任务中使用感知损失函数来训练前馈网络。我们展示了图像风格迁移的结果，其中前馈网络被训练来实时解决Gatys等人提出的优化问题。与基于优化的方法相比，我们的网络给出了相似的定性结果，但速度快了三个数量级。我们还实验了单图像超分辨率，其中用感知损失替代逐像素损失得到了视觉上令人满意的结果。

contrib.en: Proposes perceptual loss functions for training feed-forward networks, combining per-pixel and perceptual losses.
contrib.zh: 提出使用感知损失函数训练前馈网络，结合逐像素损失和感知损失。

contrib.en: Achieves real-time style transfer with quality comparable to optimization-based methods but three orders of magnitude faster.
contrib.zh: 实现实时风格迁移，质量与基于优化的方法相当，但速度快三个数量级。

contrib.en: Demonstrates that perceptual loss improves fine detail reconstruction in single-image super-resolution.
contrib.zh: 证明感知损失在单图像超分辨率中改善细节重建。

contrib.en: Uses a pretrained VGG-16 network as a fixed loss network to define feature and style reconstruction losses.
contrib.zh: 使用预训练的VGG-16网络作为固定损失网络，定义特征和风格重建损失。

contrib.en: Shows that perceptual loss enables semantic knowledge transfer from the loss network to the transformation network.
contrib.zh: 表明感知损失实现从损失网络到变换网络的语义知识迁移。

limits.en: Perceptual loss may introduce cross-hatch artifacts in super-resolution, harming PSNR and SSIM.
limits.zh: 感知损失可能在超分辨率中引入交叉影线伪影，损害PSNR和SSIM。

limits.en: Method requires a pretrained loss network, limiting applicability to tasks without suitable pretrained models.
limits.zh: 方法需要预训练的损失网络，限制了在无合适预训练模型任务上的适用性。

limits.en: Style transfer networks are trained per style, not generalizing to unseen styles without retraining.
limits.zh: 风格迁移网络按风格训练，不重新训练无法泛化到未见风格。

limits.en: Super-resolution results are evaluated qualitatively; quantitative metrics like PSNR are lower than per-pixel loss methods.
limits.zh: 超分辨率结果定性评估；定量指标如PSNR低于逐像素损失方法。

limits.en: The method's performance depends on the choice of layers in the loss network, requiring manual tuning.
limits.zh: 方法性能依赖于损失网络中层的选择，需要手动调整。

paras.en: We consider image transformation problems, where an input image is transformed into an output image. Recent methods for such problems typically train feed-forward convolutional neural networks using a per-pixel loss between the output and ground-truth images. Parallel work has shown that high-quality images can be generated by defining and optimizing perceptual loss functions based on high-level features extracted from pretrained networks. We combine the benefits of both approaches, and propose the use of perceptual loss functions for training feed-forward networks for image transformation tasks. We show results on image style transfer, where a feed-forward network is trained to solve the optimization problem proposed by Gatys et al in real-time. Compared to the optimization-based method, our network gives similar qualitative results but is three orders of magnitude faster. We also experiment with single-image super-resolution, where replacing a per-pixel loss with a perceptual loss gives visually pleasing results.
paras.zh: 我们考虑图像变换问题，其中输入图像被变换为输出图像。近期解决此类问题的方法通常使用输出图像与真实图像之间的逐像素损失来训练前馈卷积神经网络。并行工作表明，通过定义并优化基于预训练网络提取的高层特征的感知损失函数，可以生成高质量图像。我们结合了两种方法的优势，提出在图像变换任务中使用感知损失函数来训练前馈网络。我们展示了图像风格迁移的结果，其中前馈网络被训练来实时求解Gatys等人提出的优化问题。与基于优化的方法相比，我们的网络给出了相似的定性结果，但速度快了三个数量级。我们还尝试了单图像超分辨率，其中用感知损失替代逐像素损失得到了视觉上令人满意的结果。

paras.en: Many classic problems can be framed as image transformation tasks, where a system receives some input image and transforms it into an output image. Examples from image processing include denoising, super-resolution, and colorization, where the input is a degraded image (noisy, low-resolution, or grayscale) and the output is a high-quality color image. Examples from computer vision include semantic segmentation and depth estimation, where the input is a color image and the output image encodes semantic or geometric information about the scene.
paras.zh: 许多经典问题可以表述为图像变换任务，其中系统接收输入图像并将其转换为输出图像。图像处理中的例子包括去噪、超分辨率和着色，其中输入是退化图像（有噪声、低分辨率或灰度），输出是高质量彩色图像。计算机视觉中的例子包括语义分割和深度估计，其中输入是彩色图像，输出图像编码场景的语义或几何信息。

paras.en: One approach for solving image transformation tasks is to train a feed-forward convolutional neural network in a supervised manner, using a per-pixel loss function to measure the difference between output and ground-truth images. This approach has been used for example by Dong et al for super-resolution [1], by Cheng et al for colorization [2], by Long et al for segmentation [3], and by Eigen et al for depth and surface normal prediction [4, 5]. Such approaches are efficient at test-time, requiring only a forward pass through the trained network.
paras.zh: 解决图像变换任务的一种方法是以监督方式训练前馈卷积神经网络，使用逐像素损失函数来衡量输出与真实图像之间的差异。例如，Dong 等人将其用于超分辨率 [1]，Cheng 等人用于着色 [2]，Long 等人用于分割 [3]，Eigen 等人用于深度和表面法线预测 [4, 5]。这些方法在测试时效率高，只需对训练好的网络进行一次前向传播。

paras.en: However, the per-pixel losses used by these methods do not capture perceptual differences between output and ground-truth images. For example, consider two identical images offset from each other by one pixel; despite their perceptual similarity they would be very different as measured by per-pixel losses.
paras.zh: 然而，这些方法使用的逐像素损失未能捕捉输出与真实图像之间的感知差异。例如，考虑两张相同但偏移一个像素的图像；尽管它们在感知上相似，但按逐像素损失衡量却差异很大。

paras.en: In parallel, recent work has shown that high-quality images can be generated using perceptual loss functions based not on differences between pixels but instead on differences between high-level image feature representations extracted from pretrained convolutional neural networks. Images are generated by minimizing a loss function. This strategy has been applied to feature inversion [6] by Mahendran et al, to feature visualization by Simonyan et al [7] and Yosinski et al [8], and to texture synthesis and style transfer by Gatys et al [9, 10]. These approaches produce high-quality images, but are slow since inference requires solving an optimization problem.
paras.zh: 与此同时，近期工作表明，使用基于预训练卷积神经网络提取的高层图像特征表示差异（而非像素差异）的感知损失函数，可以生成高质量图像。通过最小化损失函数来生成图像。这一策略已被 Mahendran 等人用于特征反演 [6]，Simonyan 等人 [7] 和 Yosinski 等人 [8] 用于特征可视化，以及 Gatys 等人 [9, 10] 用于纹理合成和风格迁移。这些方法生成高质量图像，但速度慢，因为推理需要求解优化问题。

paras.en: In this paper we combine the benefits of these two approaches. We train feed-forward transformation networks for image transformation tasks, but rather than using per-pixel loss functions depending only on low-level pixel information, we train our networks using perceptual loss functions that depend on high-level features from a pretrained loss network. During training, perceptual losses measure image similarities more robustly than per-pixel losses, and at test-time the transformation networks run in real-time.
paras.zh: 在本文中，我们结合了这两种方法的优点。我们为图像变换任务训练前馈变换网络，但不再使用仅依赖低层像素信息的逐像素损失函数，而是使用依赖于预训练损失网络高层特征的感知损失函数来训练网络。在训练过程中，感知损失比逐像素损失更稳健地衡量图像相似性，而在测试时，变换网络实时运行。

paras.en: We experiment on two tasks: style transfer and single-image super-resolution. Both are inherently ill-posed; for style transfer there is no single correct output, and for super-resolution there are many high-resolution images that could have generated the same low-resolution input. Success in either task requires semantic reasoning about the input image. For style transfer the output must be semantically similar to the input despite drastic changes in color and texture; for super-resolution fine details must be inferred from visually ambiguous low-resolution inputs. In principle a high-capacity neural network trained for either task could implicitly learn to reason about the relevant semantics; however in practice we need not learn from scratch: the use of perceptual loss functions allows the transfer of semantic knowledge from the loss network to the transformation network.
paras.zh: 我们在两个任务上进行实验：风格迁移和单图像超分辨率。两者本质上是病态的；对于风格迁移，没有唯一正确的输出；对于超分辨率，存在许多高分辨率图像可能生成相同的低分辨率输入。任一任务的成功都需要对输入图像进行语义推理。对于风格迁移，尽管颜色和纹理发生剧烈变化，输出必须在语义上与输入相似；对于超分辨率，必须从视觉上模糊的低分辨率输入中推断出精细细节。原则上，为任一任务训练的高容量神经网络可以隐式学习推理相关语义；然而在实践中，我们无需从头学习：使用感知损失函数允许将语义知识从损失网络迁移到变换网络。

paras.en: For style transfer our feed-forward networks are trained to solve the optimization problem from [10]; our results are similar to [10] both qualitatively and as measured by objective function value, but are three orders of magnitude faster to generate. For super-resolution we show that replacing the per-pixel loss with a perceptual loss gives visually pleasing results for ×4absent4\times 4 and ×8absent8\times 8 super-resolution.
paras.zh: 对于风格迁移，我们的前馈网络被训练来解决 [10] 中的优化问题；我们的结果在定性上和目标函数值上与 [10] 相似，但生成速度快三个数量级。对于超分辨率，我们展示了用感知损失替换逐像素损失可以在 ×4 和 ×8 超分辨率下获得视觉上令人满意的结果。

paras.en: Feed-forward image transformation. In recent years, a wide variety of feed-forward image transformation tasks have been solved by training deep convolutional neural networks with per-pixel loss functions.
paras.zh: 前馈图像变换。近年来，通过使用逐像素损失函数训练深度卷积神经网络，已经解决了多种前馈图像变换任务。

paras.en: Semantic segmentation methods [3, 5, 12, 13, 14, 15] produce dense scene labels by running a network in a fully-convolutional manner over an input image, training with a per-pixel classification loss. [15] moves beyond per-pixel losses by framing CRF inference as a recurrent layer trained jointly with the rest of the network. The architecture of our transformation networks are inspired by [3] and [14], which use in-network downsampling to reduce the spatial extent of feature maps followed by in-network upsampling to produce the final output image.
paras.zh: 语义分割方法 [3, 5, 12, 13, 14, 15] 通过以全卷积方式在输入图像上运行网络，并使用逐像素分类损失进行训练，生成密集的场景标签。[15] 通过将 CRF 推理构建为与网络其余部分联合训练的循环层，超越了逐像素损失。我们的变换网络架构受到 [3] 和 [14] 的启发，它们使用网络内下采样来减少特征图的空间范围，然后使用网络内上采样来生成最终输出图像。

paras.en: Recent methods for depth [5, 4, 16] and surface normal estimation [5, 17] are similar in that they transform a color input image into a geometrically meaningful output image using a feed-forward convolutional network trained with per-pixel regression [4, 5] or classification [17] losses. Some methods move beyond per-pixel losses by penalizing image gradients [5] or using a CRF loss layer [16] to enforce local consistency in the output image. In [2] a feed-forward model is trained using a per-pixel loss to transform grayscale images to color.
paras.zh: 最近的深度估计 [5, 4, 16] 和表面法线估计 [5, 17] 方法类似，它们使用前馈卷积网络将彩色输入图像转换为具有几何意义的输出图像，并使用逐像素回归 [4, 5] 或分类 [17] 损失进行训练。一些方法通过惩罚图像梯度 [5] 或使用 CRF 损失层 [16] 来强制输出图像的局部一致性，从而超越了逐像素损失。在 [2] 中，使用逐像素损失训练前馈模型，将灰度图像转换为彩色图像。

paras.en: Perceptual optimization. A number of recent papers have used optimization to generate images where the objective is perceptual, depending on high-level features extracted from a convolutional network. Images can be generated to maximize class prediction scores [7, 8] or individual features [8] in order to understand the functions encoded in trained networks. Similar optimization techniques can also be used to generate high-confidence fooling images [18, 19].
paras.zh: 感知优化。最近的一些论文使用优化来生成图像，其目标是感知性的，依赖于从卷积网络中提取的高级特征。可以生成图像以最大化类别预测分数 [7, 8] 或单个特征 [8]，从而理解训练网络中编码的功能。类似的优化技术也可用于生成高置信度的欺骗图像 [18, 19]。

paras.en: Mahendran and Vedaldi [6] invert features from convolutional networks by minimizing a feature reconstruction loss in order to understand the image information retained by different network layers; similar methods had previously been used to invert local binary descriptors [20] and HOG features [21].
paras.zh: Mahendran 和 Vedaldi [6] 通过最小化特征重建损失来反转卷积网络的特征，以理解不同网络层保留的图像信息；类似的方法先前已用于反转局部二进制描述符 [20] 和 HOG 特征 [21]。

paras.en: The work of Dosovitskiy and Brox [22] is particularly relevant to ours, as they train a feed-forward neural network to invert convolutional features, quickly approximating a solution to the optimization problem posed by [6]. However, their feed-forward network is trained with a per-pixel reconstruction loss, while our networks directly optimize the feature reconstruction loss of [6].
paras.zh: Dosovitskiy 和 Brox 的工作 [22] 与我们的工作特别相关，他们训练了一个前馈神经网络来反转卷积特征，快速逼近 [6] 提出的优化问题的解。然而，他们的前馈网络使用逐像素重建损失进行训练，而我们的网络直接优化 [6] 的特征重建损失。

paras.en: Style Transfer. Gatys et al [10] perform artistic style transfer, combining the content of one image with the style of another by jointly minimizing the feature reconstruction loss of [6] and a style reconstruction loss also based on features extracted from a pretrained convolutional network; a similar method had previously been used for texture synthesis [9]. Their method produces high-quality results, but is computationally expensive since each step of the optimization problem requires a forward and backward pass through the pretrained network. To overcome this computational burden, we train a feed-forward network to quickly approximate solutions to their optimization problem.
paras.zh: 风格迁移。Gatys 等人 [10] 执行艺术风格迁移，通过联合最小化 [6] 的特征重建损失和同样基于预训练卷积网络提取特征的风格重建损失，将一张图像的内容与另一张图像的风格相结合；类似的方法先前已用于纹理合成 [9]。他们的方法产生高质量的结果，但由于优化问题的每一步都需要通过预训练网络进行前向和反向传播，因此计算成本很高。为了克服这一计算负担，我们训练了一个前馈网络来快速逼近其优化问题的解。

paras.en: Image super-resolution. Image super-resolution is a classic problem for which a wide variety of techniques have been developed. Yang et al [23] provide an exhaustive evaluation of the prevailing techniques prior to the widespread adoption of convolutional neural networks. They group super-resolution techniques into prediction-based methods (bilinear, bicubic, Lanczos, [24]), edge-based methods [25, 26], statistical methods [27, 28, 29], patch-based methods [25, 30, 31, 32, 33, 34, 35, 36], and sparse dictionary methods [37, 38]. Recently [1] achieved excellent performance on single-image super-resolution using a three-layer convolutional neural network trained with a per-pixel Euclidean loss. Other recent state-of-the-art methods include [39, 40, 41].
paras.zh: 图像超分辨率。图像超分辨率是一个经典问题，已经开发了多种技术。Yang 等人 [23] 在卷积神经网络广泛采用之前对主流技术进行了详尽评估。他们将超分辨率技术分为基于预测的方法（双线性、双三次、Lanczos、[24]）、基于边缘的方法 [25, 26]、统计方法 [27, 28, 29]、基于块的方法 [25, 30, 31, 32, 33, 34, 35, 36] 和稀疏字典方法 [37, 38]。最近，[1] 使用三层卷积神经网络，通过逐像素欧几里得损失训练，在单图像超分辨率上取得了优异性能。其他最近的最先进方法包括 [39, 40, 41]。

The image transformation network is a deep residual convolutional neural network parameterized by weights W𝑊W; it transforms input images x𝑥x into output images y^^𝑦\hat{y} via the mapping y^=fW​(x)^𝑦subscript𝑓𝑊𝑥\hat{y}=f_{W}(x). Each loss function computes a scalar value ℓi​(y^,yi)subscriptℓ𝑖^𝑦subscript𝑦𝑖\ell_{i}(\hat{y},y_{i}) measuring the difference between the output image y^^𝑦\hat{y} and a target image yisubscript𝑦𝑖y_{i}. The image transformation network is trained using stochastic gradient descent to minimize a weighted combination of loss functions:
paras.zh: 如图2所示，我们的系统由两个组件组成：一个图像变换网络 fW 和一个用于定义多个损失函数 ℓ1,…,ℓk 的损失网络 ϕ。图像变换网络是一个由权重 W 参数化的深度残差卷积神经网络；它通过映射 y^=fW(x) 将输入图像 x 转换为输出图像 y^。每个损失函数计算一个标量值 ℓi(y^,yi)，衡量输出图像 y^ 与目标图像 yi 之间的差异。图像变换网络使用随机梯度下降进行训练，以最小化损失函数的加权组合：

paras.en: To address the shortcomings of per-pixel losses and allow our loss functions to better measure perceptual and semantic differences between images, we draw inspiration from recent work that generates images via optimization [6, 7, 8, 9, 10]. The key insight of these methods is that convolutional neural networks pretrained for image classification have already learned to encode the perceptual and semantic information we would like to measure in our loss functions. We therefore make use of a network ϕitalic-ϕ\phi which as been pretrained for image classification as a fixed loss network in order to define our loss functions. Our deep convolutional transformation network is then trained using loss functions that are also deep convolutional networks.
paras.zh: 为了解决逐像素损失的缺点，并让我们的损失函数更好地衡量图像之间的感知和语义差异，我们从最近通过优化生成图像的工作中汲取灵感 [6, 7, 8, 9, 10]。这些方法的关键洞察是，为图像分类预训练的卷积神经网络已经学会了编码我们希望在损失函数中衡量的感知和语义信息。因此，我们使用一个已为图像分类预训练的网络 ϕ 作为固定的损失网络来定义我们的损失函数。然后，我们的深度卷积变换网络使用同样是深度卷积网络的损失函数进行训练。

paras.en: The loss network ϕitalic-ϕ\phi is used to define a feature reconstruction loss ℓf​e​a​tϕsuperscriptsubscriptℓ𝑓𝑒𝑎𝑡italic-ϕ\ell_{feat}^{\phi} and a style reconstruction loss ℓs​t​y​l​eϕsuperscriptsubscriptℓ𝑠𝑡𝑦𝑙𝑒italic-ϕ\ell_{style}^{\phi} that measure differences in content and style between images. For each input image x𝑥x we have a content target ycsubscript𝑦𝑐y_{c} and a style target yssubscript𝑦𝑠y_{s}. For style transfer, the content target ycsubscript𝑦𝑐y_{c} is the input image x𝑥x and the output image y^^𝑦\hat{y} should combine the content of x=yc𝑥subscript𝑦𝑐x=y_{c} with the style of yssubscript𝑦𝑠y_{s}; we train one network per style target. For single-image super-resolution, the input image x𝑥x is a low-resolution input, the content target ycsubscript𝑦𝑐y_{c} is the ground-truth high-resolution image, and the style reconstruction loss is not used; we train one network per super-resolution factor.
paras.zh: 损失网络 ϕ 用于定义特征重建损失 ℓfeatϕ 和风格重建损失 ℓstyleϕ，它们衡量图像之间在内容和风格上的差异。对于每个输入图像 x，我们有一个内容目标 yc 和一个风格目标 ys。对于风格迁移，内容目标 yc 是输入图像 x，输出图像 y^ 应结合 x=yc 的内容与 ys 的风格；我们为每个风格目标训练一个网络。对于单图像超分辨率，输入图像 x 是低分辨率输入，内容目标 yc 是真实高分辨率图像，并且不使用风格重建损失；我们为每个超分辨率因子训练一个网络。

paras.en: Our image transformation networks roughly follow the architectural guidelines set forth by Radford et al [42]. We do not use any pooling layers, instead using strided and fractionally strided convolutions for in-network downsampling and upsampling. Our network body consists of five residual blocks [43] using the architecture of [44]. All non-residual convolutional layers are followed by spatial batch normalization [45] and ReLU nonlinearities with the exception of the output layer, which instead uses a scaled tanh\tanh to ensure that the output image has pixels in the range [0,255]0255[0,255]. Other than the first and last layers which use 9×9999\times 9 kernels, all convolutional layers use 3×3333\times 3 kernels. The exact architectures of all our networks can be found in the supplementary material.
paras.zh: 我们的图像变换网络大致遵循 Radford 等人 [42] 提出的架构指南。我们不使用任何池化层，而是使用步长卷积和分数步长卷积进行网络内的下采样和上采样。我们的网络主体由五个残差块 [43] 组成，采用 [44] 的架构。所有非残差卷积层之后都进行空间批量归一化 [45] 和 ReLU 非线性激活，但输出层除外，它使用缩放的双曲正切 tanh\tanh 来确保输出图像的像素值在 [0,255] 范围内。除了第一层和最后一层使用 9×9 卷积核外，所有卷积层都使用 3×3 卷积核。我们所有网络的确切架构可在补充材料中找到。

paras.en: Inputs and Outputs. For style transfer the input and output are both color images of shape 3×256×25632562563\times 256\times 256. For super-resolution with an upsampling factor of f𝑓f, the output is a high-resolution image patch of shape 3×288×28832882883\times 288\times 288 and the input is a low-resolution patch of shape 3×288/f×288/f3288𝑓288𝑓3\times 288/f\times 288/f. Since the image transformation networks are fully-convolutional, at test-time they can be applied to images of any resolution.
paras.zh: 输入和输出。对于风格迁移，输入和输出都是形状为 3×256×256 的彩色图像。对于上采样因子为 f 的超分辨率，输出是形状为 3×288×288 的高分辨率图像块，输入是形状为 3×288/f×288/f 的低分辨率块。由于图像变换网络是全卷积的，在测试时它们可以应用于任意分辨率的图像。

paras.en: Downsampling and Upsampling. For super-resolution with an upsampling factor of f𝑓f, we use several residual blocks followed by log2⁡fsubscript2𝑓\log_{2}f convolutional layers with stride 1/2. This is different from [1] who use bicubic interpolation to upsample the low-resolution input before passing it to the network. Rather than relying on a fixed upsampling function, fractionally-strided convolution allows the upsampling function to be learned jointly with the rest of the network.
paras.zh: 下采样和上采样。对于上采样因子为 f 的超分辨率，我们使用几个残差块，后跟 log2f 个步长为 1/2 的卷积层。这与 [1] 不同，后者在将低分辨率输入传递给网络之前使用双三次插值进行上采样。分数步长卷积不依赖固定的上采样函数，而是允许上采样函数与网络其余部分联合学习。

paras.en: For style transfer our networks use two stride-2 convolutions to downsample the input followed by several residual blocks and then two convolutional layers with stride 1/2 to upsample. Although the input and output have the same size, there are several benefits to networks that downsample and then upsample.
paras.zh: 对于风格迁移，我们的网络使用两个步长为 2 的卷积对输入进行下采样，然后使用几个残差块，再使用两个步长为 1/2 的卷积层进行上采样。尽管输入和输出具有相同的大小，但先下采样再上采样的网络有几个好处。

paras.en: The first is computational. With a naive implementation, a 3×3333\times 3 convolution with C𝐶C filters on an input of size C×H×W𝐶𝐻𝑊C\times H\times W requires 9​H​W​C29𝐻𝑊superscript𝐶29HWC^{2} multiply-adds, which is the same cost as a 3×3333\times 3 convolution with D​C𝐷𝐶DC filters on an input of shape D​C×H/D×W/D𝐷𝐶𝐻𝐷𝑊𝐷DC\times H/D\times W/D. After downsampling, we can therefore use a larger network for the same computational cost.
paras.zh: 第一个是计算上的。在朴素实现中，对于大小为 C×H×W 的输入，使用 C 个 3×3 卷积核的卷积需要 9HWC^2 次乘加运算，这与在形状为 DC×H/D×W/D 的输入上使用 DC 个 3×3 卷积核的卷积成本相同。因此，在下采样后，我们可以使用更大的网络而计算成本不变。

paras.en: The second benefit has to do with effective receptive field sizes. High-quality style transfer requires changing large parts of the image in a coherent way; therefore it is advantageous for each pixel in the output to have a large effective receptive field in the input. Without downsampling, each additional 3×3333\times 3 convolutional layer increases the effective receptive field size by 2. After downsampling by a factor of D𝐷D, each 3×3333\times 3 convolution instead increases effective receptive field size by 2​D2𝐷2D, giving larger effective receptive fields with the same number of layers.
paras.zh: 第二个好处与有效感受野大小有关。高质量的风格迁移需要以连贯的方式改变图像的大片区域；因此，输出中的每个像素在输入中具有较大的有效感受野是有利的。没有下采样时，每增加一个 3×3 卷积层，有效感受野大小增加 2。在下采样因子为 D 后，每个 3×3 卷积反而使有效感受野大小增加 2D，从而在相同层数下获得更大的有效感受野。

paras.en: Residual Connections. He et al [43] use residual connections to train very deep networks for image classification. They argue that residual connections make it easy for the network to learn the identify function; this is an appealing property for image transformation networks, since in most cases the output image should share structure with the input image. The body of our network thus consists of several residual blocks, each of which contains two 3×3333\times 3 convolutional layers. We use the residual block design of [44], shown in the supplementary material.
paras.zh: 残差连接。He 等人 [43] 使用残差连接来训练非常深的图像分类网络。他们认为残差连接使网络易于学习恒等函数；这对于图像变换网络来说是一个有吸引力的特性，因为在大多数情况下，输出图像应与输入图像共享结构。因此，我们的网络主体由几个残差块组成，每个残差块包含两个 3×3 卷积层。我们使用 [44] 的残差块设计，如补充材料所示。

paras.en: We define two perceptual loss functions that measure high-level perceptual and semantic differences between images. They make use of a loss network ϕitalic-ϕ\phi pretrained for image classification, meaning that these perceptual loss functions are themselves deep convolutional neural networks. In all our experiments ϕitalic-ϕ\phi is the 16-layer VGG network [46] pretrained on the ImageNet dataset [47].
paras.zh: 我们定义了两个感知损失函数，用于衡量图像之间高级的感知和语义差异。它们使用了一个为图像分类预训练的损失网络 ϕ，这意味着这些感知损失函数本身就是深度卷积神经网络。在我们所有的实验中，ϕ 是在 ImageNet 数据集 [47] 上预训练的 16 层 VGG 网络 [46]。

paras.en: Feature Reconstruction Loss. Rather than encouraging the pixels of the output image y^=fW​(x)^𝑦subscript𝑓𝑊𝑥\hat{y}=f_{W}(x) to exactly match the pixels of the target image y𝑦y, we instead encourage them to have similar feature representations as computed by the loss network ϕitalic-ϕ\phi. Let ϕj​(x)subscriptitalic-ϕ𝑗𝑥\phi_{j}(x) be the activations of the j𝑗jth layer of the network ϕitalic-ϕ\phi when processing the image x𝑥x; if j𝑗j is a convolutional layer then ϕj​(x)subscriptitalic-ϕ𝑗𝑥\phi_{j}(x) will be a feature map of shape Cj×Hj×Wjsubscript𝐶𝑗subscript𝐻𝑗subscript𝑊𝑗C_{j}\times H_{j}\times W_{j}. The feature reconstruction loss is the (squared, normalized) Euclidean distance between feature representations:
paras.zh: 特征重构损失。我们不鼓励输出图像 y^=fW(x) 的像素与目标图像 y 的像素完全匹配，而是鼓励它们具有由损失网络 ϕ 计算的相似特征表示。令 ϕj(x) 为网络 ϕ 在处理图像 x 时第 j 层的激活值；如果 j 是卷积层，则 ϕj(x) 是一个形状为 Cj×Hj×Wj 的特征图。特征重构损失是特征表示之间的（平方、归一化的）欧氏距离：

paras.en: As demonstrated in [6] and reproduced in Figure 3, finding an image y^^𝑦\hat{y} that minimizes the feature reconstruction loss for early layers tends to produce images that are visually indistinguishable from y𝑦y. As we reconstruct from higher layers, image content and overall spatial structure are preserved but color, texture, and exact shape are not. Using a feature reconstruction loss for training our image transformation networks encourages the output image y^^𝑦\hat{y} to be perceptually similar to the target image y𝑦y, but does not force them to match exactly.
paras.zh: 如 [6] 所示并在图 3 中复现，找到最小化早期层特征重构损失的图像 y^ 往往会产生与 y 视觉上难以区分的图像。当我们从更高层重构时，图像内容和整体空间结构得以保留，但颜色、纹理和精确形状则不会。使用特征重构损失训练我们的图像变换网络，鼓励输出图像 y^ 在感知上与目标图像 y 相似，但不强制它们完全匹配。

paras.en: Style Reconstruction Loss. The feature reconstruction loss penalizes the output image y^^𝑦\hat{y} when it deviates in content from the target y𝑦y. We also wish to penalize differences in style: colors, textures, common patterns, etc. To achieve this effect, Gatys et al [9, 10] propose the following style reconstruction loss.
paras.zh: 风格重构损失。特征重构损失在输出图像 y^ 的内容偏离目标 y 时对其进行惩罚。我们还希望惩罚风格上的差异：颜色、纹理、常见模式等。为了实现这一效果，Gatys 等人 [9, 10] 提出了以下风格重构损失。

paras.en: As above, let ϕj​(x)subscriptitalic-ϕ𝑗𝑥\phi_{j}(x) be the activations at the j𝑗jth layer of the network ϕitalic-ϕ\phi for the input x𝑥x, which is a feature map of shape Cj×Hj×Wjsubscript𝐶𝑗subscript𝐻𝑗subscript𝑊𝑗C_{j}\times H_{j}\times W_{j}. Define the Gram matrix Gjϕ​(x)subscriptsuperscript𝐺italic-ϕ𝑗𝑥G^{\phi}_{j}(x) to be the Cj×Cjsubscript𝐶𝑗subscript𝐶𝑗C_{j}\times C_{j} matrix whose elements are given by
paras.zh: 如上所述，令 ϕj(x) 为输入 x 在网络 ϕ 第 j 层的激活值，它是一个形状为 Cj×Hj×Wj 的特征图。定义 Gram 矩阵 Gjϕ(x) 为 Cj×Cj 矩阵，其元素由下式给出：

paras.en: If we interpret ϕj​(x)subscriptitalic-ϕ𝑗𝑥\phi_{j}(x) as giving Cjsubscript𝐶𝑗C_{j}-dimensional features for each point on a Hj×Wjsubscript𝐻𝑗subscript𝑊𝑗H_{j}\times W_{j} grid, then Gjϕ​(x)subscriptsuperscript𝐺italic-ϕ𝑗𝑥G^{\phi}_{j}(x) is proportional to the uncentered covariance of the Cjsubscript𝐶𝑗C_{j}-dimensional features, treating each grid location as an independent sample. It thus captures information about which features tend to activate together. The Gram matrix can be computed efficiently by reshaping ϕj​(x)subscriptitalic-ϕ𝑗𝑥\phi_{j}(x) into a matrix ψ𝜓\psi of shape Cj×Hj​Wjsubscript𝐶𝑗subscript𝐻𝑗subscript𝑊𝑗C_{j}\times H_{j}W_{j}; then Gjϕ​(x)=ψ​ψT/Cj​Hj​Wjsubscriptsuperscript𝐺italic-ϕ𝑗𝑥𝜓superscript𝜓𝑇subscript𝐶𝑗subscript𝐻𝑗subscript𝑊𝑗G^{\phi}_{j}(x)=\psi\psi^{T}/C_{j}H_{j}W_{j}.
paras.zh: 如果我们将 ϕj(x) 解释为在 Hj×Wj 网格上的每个点提供 Cj 维特征，那么 Gjϕ(x) 与 Cj 维特征的无中心协方差成正比，将每个网格位置视为独立样本。因此，它捕获了哪些特征倾向于共同激活的信息。Gram 矩阵可以通过将 ϕj(x) 重塑为形状为 Cj×HjWj 的矩阵 ψ 来高效计算；那么 Gjϕ(x)=ψψT/(CjHjWj)。

paras.en: The style reconstruction loss is then the squared Frobenius norm of the difference between the Gram matrices of the output and target images:
paras.zh: 风格重构损失则是输出图像和目标图像的 Gram 矩阵之差的平方 Frobenius 范数：

paras.en: The style reconstruction loss is well-defined even when y^^𝑦\hat{y} and y𝑦y have different sizes, since their Gram matrices will both have the same shape.
paras.zh: 即使 y^ 和 y 具有不同的大小，风格重构损失也是良定义的，因为它们的 Gram 矩阵形状相同。

paras.en: As demonstrated in [10] and reproduced in Figure 5, generating an image y^^𝑦\hat{y} that minimizes the style reconstruction loss preserves stylistic features from the target image, but does not preserve its spatial structure. Reconstructing from higher layers transfers larger-scale structure from the target image.
paras.zh: 如 [10] 所示并在图 5 中复现，生成最小化风格重构损失的图像 y^ 保留了目标图像的风格特征，但不保留其空间结构。从更高层重构会从目标图像传递更大尺度的结构。

paras.en: To perform style reconstruction from a set of layers J𝐽J rather than a single layer j𝑗j, we define ℓs​t​y​l​eϕ,J​(y^,y)superscriptsubscriptℓ𝑠𝑡𝑦𝑙𝑒italic-ϕ𝐽^𝑦𝑦\ell_{style}^{\phi,J}(\hat{y},y) to be the sum of losses for each layer j∈J𝑗𝐽j\in J.
paras.zh: 为了从一组层 J 而不是单个层 j 进行风格重构，我们定义 ℓstyleϕ,J(y^,y) 为每个层 j∈J 的损失之和。

paras.en: In addition to the perceptual losses defined above, we also define two simple loss functions that depend only on low-level pixel information.
paras.zh: 除了上述感知损失，我们还定义了两个仅依赖于低级像素信息的简单损失函数。

paras.en: Pixel Loss. The pixel loss is the (normalized) Euclidean distance between the output image y^^𝑦\hat{y} and the target y𝑦y. If both have shape C×H×W𝐶𝐻𝑊C\times H\times W, then the pixel loss is defined as ℓp​i​x​e​l​(y^,y)=‖y^−y‖22/C​H​Wsubscriptℓ𝑝𝑖𝑥𝑒𝑙^𝑦𝑦subscriptsuperscriptnorm^𝑦𝑦22𝐶𝐻𝑊\ell_{pixel}(\hat{y},y)=\|\hat{y}-y\|^{2}_{2}/CHW. This can only be used when when we have a ground-truth target y𝑦y that the network is expected to match.
paras.zh: 像素损失。像素损失是输出图像 y^^𝑦\hat{y} 与目标 y𝑦y 之间的（归一化）欧氏距离。如果两者形状均为 C×H×W𝐶𝐻𝑊C\times H\times W，则像素损失定义为 ℓpixel(y^,y)=‖y^−y‖22/CHWsubscriptℓ𝑝𝑖𝑥𝑒𝑙^𝑦𝑦subscriptsuperscriptnorm^𝑦𝑦22𝐶𝐻𝑊\ell_{pixel}(\hat{y},y)=\|\hat{y}-y\|^{2}_{2}/CHW。这仅当存在网络期望匹配的真实目标 y𝑦y 时才能使用。

paras.en: Total Variation Regularization. To encourage spatial smoothness in the output image y^^𝑦\hat{y}, we follow prior work on feature inversion [6, 20] and super-resolution [48, 49] and make use of total variation regularizer ℓT​V​(y^)subscriptℓ𝑇𝑉^𝑦\ell_{TV}(\hat{y}).
paras.zh: 总变差正则化。为了鼓励输出图像 y^^𝑦\hat{y} 的空间平滑性，我们遵循特征反演 [6] 和超分辨率 [48, 49] 的先前工作，使用总变差正则化项 ℓTV(y^)subscriptℓ𝑇𝑉^𝑦\ell_{TV}(\hat{y})。

paras.en: We perform experiments on two image transformation tasks: style transfer and single-image super-resolution. Prior work on style transfer has used optimization to generate images; our feed-forward networks give similar qualitative results but are up to three orders of magnitude faster. Prior work on single-image super-resolution with convolutional neural networks has used a per-pixel loss; we show encouraging qualitative results by using a perceptual loss instead.
paras.zh: 我们在两个图像变换任务上进行了实验：风格迁移和单图像超分辨率。先前关于风格迁移的工作使用优化来生成图像；我们的前馈网络在定性结果上相似，但速度快了三个数量级。先前关于使用卷积神经网络进行单图像超分辨率的工作使用了逐像素损失；我们通过使用感知损失展示了令人鼓舞的定性结果。

paras.en: The goal of style transfer is to generate an image y^^𝑦\hat{y} that combines the content of a target content image ycsubscript𝑦𝑐y_{c} with the the style of a target style image yssubscript𝑦𝑠y_{s}. We train one image transformation network per style target for several hand-picked style targets and compare our results with the baseline approach of Gatys et al [10].
paras.zh: 风格迁移的目标是生成一张图像 ŷ，它结合了目标内容图像 y_c 的内容和目标风格图像 y_s 的风格。我们针对几个手工挑选的风格目标，每个训练一个图像变换网络，并将结果与 Gatys 等人的基线方法 [10] 进行比较。

paras.en: Baseline. As a baseline, we reimplement the method of Gatys et al [10]. Given style and content targets yssubscript𝑦𝑠y_{s} and ycsubscript𝑦𝑐y_{c} and layers j𝑗j and J𝐽J at which to perform feature and style reconstruction, an image y^^𝑦\hat{y} is generated by solving the problem
paras.zh: 基线。作为基线，我们重新实现了 Gatys 等人的方法 [10]。给定风格和内容目标 y_s 和 y_c，以及用于特征重建和风格重建的层 j 和 J，通过求解以下问题生成图像 ŷ：

paras.en: where λc,λssubscript𝜆𝑐subscript𝜆𝑠\lambda_{c},\lambda_{s}, and λT​Vsubscript𝜆𝑇𝑉\lambda_{TV} are scalars, y𝑦y is initialized with white noise, and optimization is performed using L-BFGS. We find that unconstrained optimization of Equation 5 typically results in images whose pixels fall outside the range [0,255]0255[0,255]. For a more fair comparison with our method whose output is constrained to this range, for the baseline we minimize Equation 5 using projected L-BFGS by clipping the image y𝑦y to the range [0,255]0255[0,255] at each iteration. In most cases optimization converges to satisfactory results within 500 iterations. This method is slow because each L-BFGS iteration requires a forward and backward pass through the VGG-16 loss network ϕitalic-ϕ\phi.
paras.zh: 其中 λ_c、λ_s 和 λ_TV 是标量，y 初始化为白噪声，并使用 L-BFGS 进行优化。我们发现，对公式 5 进行无约束优化通常会导致图像像素超出 [0,255] 范围。为了与我们的方法（其输出被约束在该范围内）进行更公平的比较，对于基线，我们使用投影 L-BFGS 最小化公式 5，即在每次迭代中将图像 y 裁剪到 [0,255] 范围。在大多数情况下，优化在 500 次迭代内收敛到令人满意的结果。这种方法很慢，因为每次 L-BFGS 迭代都需要通过 VGG-16 损失网络 φ 进行一次前向和反向传播。

paras.en: Training Details. Our style transfer networks are trained on the Microsoft COCO dataset [50]. We resize each of the 80k training images to 256×256256256256\times 256 and train our networks with a batch size of 4 for 40,000 iterations, giving roughly two epochs over the training data. We use Adam [51] with a learning rate of 1×10−31superscript1031\times 10^{-3}. The output images are regularized with total variation regularization with a strength of between 1×10−61superscript1061\times 10^{-6} and 1×10−41superscript1041\times 10^{-4}, chosen via cross-validation per style target. We do not use weight decay or dropout, as the model does not overfit within two epochs. For all style transfer experiments we compute feature reconstruction loss at layer relu2_2 and style reconstruction loss at layers relu1_2, relu2_2, relu3_3, and relu4_3 of the VGG-16 loss network ϕitalic-ϕ\phi. Our implementation uses Torch [52] and cuDNN [53]; training takes roughly 4 hours on a single GTX Titan X GPU.
paras.zh: 训练细节。我们的风格迁移网络在 Microsoft COCO 数据集 [50] 上训练。我们将 80k 训练图像每张调整为 256×256，并以批量大小 4 训练网络 40,000 次迭代，大约两个 epoch 的训练数据。我们使用 Adam [51]，学习率为 1×10^{-3}。输出图像使用总变差正则化，强度在 1×10^{-6} 到 1×10^{-4} 之间，通过每个风格目标的交叉验证选择。我们不使用权重衰减或 dropout，因为模型在两个 epoch 内不会过拟合。对于所有风格迁移实验，我们在 VGG-16 损失网络 φ 的 relu2_2 层计算特征重建损失，在 relu1_2、relu2_2、relu3_3 和 relu4_3 层计算风格重建损失。我们的实现使用 Torch [52] 和 cuDNN [53]；在单个 GTX Titan X GPU 上训练大约需要 4 小时。

paras.zh: 风格《星夜》，文森特·梵高，1889 风格《缪斯》，巴勃罗·毕加索，1935 风格《构成 VII》，瓦西里·康定斯基，1913 风格《神奈川冲浪里》，葛饰北斋，1829-1832 风格素描 风格《辛普森一家》 内容 [10] 我们的 内容 [10] 我们的

paras.en: Qualitative Results. In Figure 6 we show qualitative examples comparing our results with those of the baseline method for a variety of style and content images. In all cases the hyperparameters λcsubscript𝜆𝑐\lambda_{c}, λssubscript𝜆𝑠\lambda_{s}, and λT​Vsubscript𝜆𝑇𝑉\lambda_{TV} are exactly the same between the two methods; all content images are taken from the MS-COCO 2014 validation set. Overall our results are qualitatively similar to the baseline.
paras.zh: 定性结果。在图 6 中，我们展示了定性示例，将我们的结果与基线方法在各种风格和内容图像上的结果进行比较。在所有情况下，两种方法的超参数 λ_c、λ_s 和 λ_TV 完全相同；所有内容图像均来自 MS-COCO 2014 验证集。总体而言，我们的结果在定性上与基线相似。

paras.en: Although our models are trained with 256×256256256256\times 256 images, they can be applied in a fully-convolutional manner to images of any size at test-time. In Figure 7 we show examples of style transfer using our models on 512×512512512512\times 512 images.
paras.zh: 尽管我们的模型是在 256×256 图像上训练的，但在测试时可以以全卷积方式应用于任意大小的图像。在图 7 中，我们展示了使用我们的模型在 512×512 图像上进行风格迁移的示例。

paras.en: In these results it is clear that the trained style transfer network is aware of the semantic content of images. For example in the beach image in Figure 7 the people are clearly recognizable in the transformed image but the background is warped beyond recognition; similarly in the cat image, the cat’s face is clear in the transformed image, but its body is not. One explanation is that the VGG-16 loss network has features which are selective for people and animals since these objects are present in the classification dataset on which it was trained. Our style transfer networks are trained to preserve VGG-16 features, and in doing so they learn to preserve people and animals more than background objects.
paras.zh: 在这些结果中，很明显训练好的风格迁移网络能够感知图像的语义内容。例如，在图 7 的海滩图像中，变换后的图像中人物清晰可辨，但背景被扭曲得无法辨认；类似地，在猫的图像中，猫的脸在变换后的图像中清晰可见，但身体则不然。一种解释是，VGG-16 损失网络具有对人和动物具有选择性的特征，因为这些物体存在于其训练的分类数据集中。我们的风格迁移网络被训练为保留 VGG-16 特征，因此它们学会了更多地保留人和动物，而不是背景物体。

paras.en: Quantitative Results. The baseline and our method both minimize Equation 5. The baseline performs explicit optimization over the output image, while our method is trained to find a solution for any content image ycsubscript𝑦𝑐y_{c} in a single forward pass. We may therefore quantitatively compare the two methods by measuring the degree to which they successfully minimize Equation 5.
paras.zh: 定量结果。基线和我们的方法都最小化公式 5。基线对输出图像进行显式优化，而我们的方法则训练为通过单次前向传播为任何内容图像 y_c 找到解。因此，我们可以通过测量它们成功最小化公式 5 的程度来定量比较这两种方法。

paras.en: We run our method and the baseline on 50 images from the MS-COCO validation set, using The Muse by Pablo Picasso as a style image. For the baseline we record the value of the objective function at each iteration of optimization, and for our method we record the value of Equation 5 for each image; we also compute the value of Equation 5 when y𝑦y is equal to the content image ycsubscript𝑦𝑐y_{c}. Results are shown in Figure 5. We see that the content image ycsubscript𝑦𝑐y_{c} achieves a very high loss, and that our method achieves a loss comparable to between 50 and 100 iterations of explicit optimization.
paras.zh: 我们在 MS-COCO 验证集的 50 张图像上运行我们的方法和基线，使用巴勃罗·毕加索的《缪斯》作为风格图像。对于基线，我们记录每次优化迭代时目标函数的值；对于我们的方法，我们记录每张图像的公式 5 的值；我们还计算当 y 等于内容图像 y_c 时公式 5 的值。结果如图 5 所示。我们看到内容图像 y_c 的损失非常高，而我们的方法达到了与 50 到 100 次显式优化迭代相当的损失。

paras.en: Although our networks are trained to minimize Equation 5 for 256×256256256256\times 256 images, they are also successful at minimizing the objective when applied to larger images. We repeat the same quantitative evaluation for 50 images at 512×512512512512\times 512 and 1024×1024102410241024\times 1024; results are shown in Figure 5. We see that even at higher resolutions our model achieves a loss comparable to 50 to 100 iterations of the baseline method.
paras.zh: 尽管我们的网络被训练为在 256×256 图像上最小化公式 5，但当应用于更大图像时，它们也能成功最小化目标。我们对 50 张 512×512 和 1024×1024 的图像重复相同的定量评估；结果如图 5 所示。我们看到，即使在更高分辨率下，我们的模型也能达到与基线方法 50 到 100 次迭代相当的损失。

paras.en: Speed. In Table 1 we compare the runtime of our method and the baseline for several image sizes; for the baseline we report times for varying numbers of optimization iterations. Across all image sizes, we see that the runtime of our method is approximately twice the speed of a single iteration of the baseline method. Compared to 500 iterations of the baseline method, our method is three orders of magnitude faster. Our method processes images of size 512×512512512512\times 512 at 20 FPS, making it feasible to run style transfer in real-time or on video.
paras.zh: 速度。在表 1 中，我们比较了我们的方法和基线在几种图像大小下的运行时间；对于基线，我们报告了不同优化迭代次数的时间。在所有图像大小下，我们看到我们的方法的运行时间大约是基线方法单次迭代的两倍。与基线方法的 500 次迭代相比，我们的方法快三个数量级。我们的方法处理 512×512 图像的速度为 20 FPS，使得风格迁移可以实时或在视频上运行。

paras.en: Ours (ℓp​i​x​e​lsubscriptℓ𝑝𝑖𝑥𝑒𝑙\ell_{pixel})
paras.zh: 我们的 (ℓ_pixel)

paras.en: Ours (ℓp​i​x​e​lsubscriptℓ𝑝𝑖𝑥𝑒𝑙\ell_{pixel})
paras.zh: 我们的 (ℓ_pixel)

paras.en: In single-image super-resolution, the task is to generate a high-resolution output image from a low-resolution input. This is an inherently ill-posed problem, since for each low-resolution image there exist multiple high-resolution images that could have generated it. The ambiguity becomes more extreme as the super-resolution factor grows; for large factors (×4absent4\times 4, ×8absent8\times 8), fine details of the high-resolution image may have little or no evidence in its low-resolution version.
paras.zh: 在单图像超分辨率中，任务是从低分辨率输入生成高分辨率输出图像。这是一个本质上的不适定问题，因为对于每张低分辨率图像，可能存在多张高分辨率图像与之对应。随着超分辨率倍数的增大，这种模糊性变得更加极端；对于大倍数（×4、×8），高分辨率图像的精细细节在低分辨率版本中可能几乎没有或完全没有证据。

paras.en: To overcome this problem, we train super-resolution networks not with the per-pixel loss typically used [1] but instead with a feature reconstruction loss (see Section 3) to allow transfer of semantic knowledge from the pretrained loss network to the super-resolution network. We focus on ×4absent4\times 4 and ×8absent8\times 8 super-resolution since larger factors require more semantic reasoning about the input.
paras.zh: 为了克服这个问题，我们训练超分辨率网络时不使用通常采用的逐像素损失 [1]，而是使用特征重建损失（见第3节），从而将语义知识从预训练的损失网络迁移到超分辨率网络。我们专注于 ×4 和 ×8 超分辨率，因为更大的倍数需要对输入进行更多的语义推理。

paras.en: The traditional metrics used to evaluate super-resolution are PSNR and SSIM [54], both of which have been found to correlate poorly with human assessment of visual quality [55, 56, 57, 58, 59]. PSNR and SSIM rely only on low-level differences between pixels and operate under the assumption of additive Gaussian noise, which may be invalid for super-resolution. In addition, PSNR is equivalent to the per-pixel loss ℓp​i​x​e​lsubscriptℓ𝑝𝑖𝑥𝑒𝑙\ell_{pixel}, so as measured by PSNR a model trained to minimize per-pixel loss should always outperform a model trained to minimize feature reconstruction loss. We therefore emphasize that the goal of these experiments is not to achieve state-of-the-art PSNR or SSIM results, but instead to showcase the qualitative difference between models trained with per-pixel and feature reconstruction losses.
paras.zh: 用于评估超分辨率的传统指标是 PSNR 和 SSIM [54]，两者都被发现与人类对视觉质量的评估相关性较差 [55, 56, 57, 58, 59]。PSNR 和 SSIM 仅依赖于像素之间的低级差异，并在加性高斯噪声的假设下运行，这对于超分辨率可能无效。此外，PSNR 等价于逐像素损失 ℓ_pixel，因此以 PSNR 衡量时，训练以最小化逐像素损失的模型应始终优于训练以最小化特征重建损失的模型。因此，我们强调这些实验的目标不是实现最先进的 PSNR 或 SSIM 结果，而是展示使用逐像素损失和特征重建损失训练的模型之间的定性差异。

paras.en: Model Details. We train models to perform ×4absent4\times 4 and ×8absent8\times 8 super-resolution by minimizing feature reconstruction loss at layer relu2_2 from the VGG-16 loss network ϕitalic-ϕ\phi. We train with 288×288288288288\times 288 patches from 10k images from the MS-COCO training set, and prepare low-resolution inputs by blurring with a Gaussian kernel of width σ=1.0𝜎1.0\sigma=1.0 and downsampling with bicubic interpolation. We train with a batch size of 4 for 200k iterations using Adam [51] with a learning rate of 1×10−31superscript1031\times 10^{-3} without weight decay or dropout. As a post-processing step, we perform histogram matching between our network output and the low-resolution input.
paras.zh: 模型细节。我们通过最小化来自 VGG-16 损失网络 φ 的 relu2_2 层的特征重建损失，训练模型执行 ×4 和 ×8 超分辨率。我们使用来自 MS-COCO 训练集的 10k 张图像的 288×288 块进行训练，并通过宽度为 σ=1.0 的高斯核模糊和双三次插值下采样来准备低分辨率输入。我们使用批量大小为 4，训练 200k 次迭代，采用 Adam [51] 优化器，学习率为 1×10^{-3}，无权重衰减或 dropout。作为后处理步骤，我们在网络输出和低分辨率输入之间进行直方图匹配。

paras.en: Baselines. As a baseline model we use SRCNN [1] for its state-of-the-art performance. SRCNN is a three-layer convolutional network trained to minimize per-pixel loss on 33×33333333\times 33 patches from the ILSVRC 2013 detection dataset. SRCNN is not trained for ×8absent8\times 8 super-resolution, so we can only evaluate it on ×4absent4\times 4.
paras.zh: 基线模型。作为基线模型，我们使用 SRCNN [1]，因其具有最先进的性能。SRCNN 是一个三层卷积网络，在 ILSVRC 2013 检测数据集的 33×33 块上训练，以最小化逐像素损失。SRCNN 未针对 ×8 超分辨率进行训练，因此我们只能评估其在 ×4 上的表现。

paras.en: SRCNN is trained for more than 109superscript10910^{9} iterations, which is not computationally feasible for our models. To account for differences between SRCNN and our model in data, training, and architecture, we train image transformation networks for ×4absent4\times 4 and ×8absent8\times 8 super-resolution using ℓp​i​x​e​lsubscriptℓ𝑝𝑖𝑥𝑒𝑙\ell_{pixel}; these networks use identical data, architecture, and training as the networks trained to minimize ℓf​e​a​tsubscriptℓ𝑓𝑒𝑎𝑡\ell_{feat}.
paras.zh: SRCNN 训练了超过 10^9 次迭代，这对于我们的模型在计算上不可行。为了说明 SRCNN 与我们的模型在数据、训练和架构上的差异，我们使用 ℓ_pixel 训练用于 ×4 和 ×8 超分辨率的图像变换网络；这些网络使用与训练以最小化 ℓ_feat 的网络相同的数据、架构和训练过程。

paras.en: Evaluation. We evaluate all models on the standard Set5 [60], Set14 [61], and BSD100 [41] datasets. We report PSNR and SSIM [54], computing both only on the Y channel after converting to the YCbCr colorspace, following [1, 39].
paras.zh: 评估。我们在标准数据集 Set5 [60]、Set14 [61] 和 BSD100 [41] 上评估所有模型。我们报告 PSNR 和 SSIM [54]，在转换为 YCbCr 色彩空间后仅计算 Y 通道，遵循 [1, 39]。

paras.en: Results. We show results for ×4absent4\times 4 super-resolution in Figure 8. Compared to the other methods, our model trained for feature reconstruction does a very good job at reconstructing sharp edges and fine details, such as the eyelashes in the first image and the individual elements of the hat in the second image. The feature reconstruction loss gives rise to a slight cross-hatch pattern visible under magnification, which harms its PSNR and SSIM compared to baseline methods.
paras.zh: 结果。我们在图 8 中展示了 ×4 超分辨率的结果。与其他方法相比，我们为特征重建训练的模型在重建锐利边缘和精细细节方面表现非常好，例如第一张图像中的睫毛和第二张图像中帽子的各个元素。特征重建损失在放大下会产生轻微的交叉影线图案，这损害了其与基线方法相比的 PSNR 和 SSIM。

paras.en: Results for ×8absent8\times 8 super-resolution are shown in Figure 9. Again we see that our ℓf​e​a​tsubscriptℓ𝑓𝑒𝑎𝑡\ell_{feat} model does a good job at edges and fine details compared to other models, such as the horse’s legs and hooves. The ℓf​e​a​tsubscriptℓ𝑓𝑒𝑎𝑡\ell_{feat} model does not sharpen edges indiscriminately; compared to the ℓp​i​x​e​lsubscriptℓ𝑝𝑖𝑥𝑒𝑙\ell_{pixel} model, the ℓf​e​a​tsubscriptℓ𝑓𝑒𝑎𝑡\ell_{feat} model sharpens the boundary edges of the horse and rider but the background trees remain diffuse, suggesting that the ℓf​e​a​tsubscriptℓ𝑓𝑒𝑎𝑡\ell_{feat} model may be more aware of image semantics.
paras.zh: ×8 超分辨率的结果如图 9 所示。我们再次看到，与其他模型相比，我们的 ℓ_feat 模型在边缘和精细细节（如马的腿和蹄）方面表现良好。ℓ_feat 模型不会不加区分地锐化边缘；与 ℓ_pixel 模型相比，ℓ_feat 模型锐化了马和骑手的边界边缘，但背景树木保持模糊，这表明 ℓ_feat 模型可能更了解图像语义。

paras.en: Since our ℓp​i​x​e​lsubscriptℓ𝑝𝑖𝑥𝑒𝑙\ell_{pixel} and our ℓf​e​a​tsubscriptℓ𝑓𝑒𝑎𝑡\ell_{feat} models share the same architecture, data, and training procedure, all differences between them are due to the difference between the ℓp​i​x​e​lsubscriptℓ𝑝𝑖𝑥𝑒𝑙\ell_{pixel} and ℓf​e​a​tsubscriptℓ𝑓𝑒𝑎𝑡\ell_{feat} losses. The ℓp​i​x​e​lsubscriptℓ𝑝𝑖𝑥𝑒𝑙\ell_{pixel} loss gives fewer visual artifacts and higher PSNR values but the ℓf​e​a​tsubscriptℓ𝑓𝑒𝑎𝑡\ell_{feat} loss does a better job at reconstructing fine details, leading to pleasing visual results.
paras.zh: 由于我们的 ℓ_pixel 和 ℓ_feat 模型共享相同的架构、数据和训练过程，它们之间的所有差异都源于 ℓ_pixel 和 ℓ_feat 损失之间的差异。ℓ_pixel 损失产生较少的视觉伪影和更高的 PSNR 值，但 ℓ_feat 损失在重建精细细节方面做得更好，从而产生令人愉悦的视觉结果。

paras.en: Ours (ℓp​i​x​e​lsubscriptℓ𝑝𝑖𝑥𝑒𝑙\ell_{pixel})
paras.zh: 我们的（ℓ_pixel）

paras.en: In this paper we have combined the benefits of feed-forward image transformation tasks and optimization-based methods for image generation by training feed-forward transformation networks with perceptual loss functions. We have applied this method to style transfer where we achieve comparable performance and drastically improved speed compared to existing methods, and to single-image super-resolution where we show that training with a perceptual loss allows the model to better reconstruct fine details and edges.
paras.zh: 在本文中，我们通过使用感知损失函数训练前馈变换网络，结合了前馈图像变换任务和基于优化的图像生成方法的优势。我们将此方法应用于风格迁移，实现了与现有方法相当的性能并大幅提升了速度；以及单图像超分辨率，我们展示了使用感知损失进行训练使模型能够更好地重建精细细节和边缘。

paras.en: In future work we hope to explore the use of perceptual loss functions for other image transformation tasks, such as colorization and semantic segmentation. We also plan to investigate the use of different loss networks to see whether for example loss networks trained on different tasks or datasets can impart image transformation networks with different types of semantic knowledge.
paras.zh: 在未来的工作中，我们希望探索将感知损失函数用于其他图像变换任务，例如着色和语义分割。我们还计划研究使用不同的损失网络，以观察例如在不同任务或数据集上训练的损失网络是否能够赋予图像变换网络不同类型的语义知识。
